evals.prompt: Write a devlog for today's work
evals.expected_output: Devlog file written to .orchestra/devlog/{YYYY}-Q{N}/{YYYY-MM-DD}-devlog.md with correct structure.
assertions: Devlog frontmatter has created_on field with today's date
Devlog has a ## What Happened section
Devlog has a ## Decisions section or equivalent
Devlog has a ## Next Steps section
Devlog content is specific — not generic placeholder text
Quarter directory matches today's date (Q1=Jan-Mar, Q2=Apr-Jun, Q3=Jul-Sep, Q4=Oct-Dec)

evals.prompt: Journal today's work from git commits
evals.expected_output: Devlog synthesized from git log. Commit messages translated into narrative form. File written to correct location.
assertions: Skill runs git log to read recent commits
Devlog narrative references actual commit content, not generic descriptions
Devlog is written in first-person narrative, not a bulleted commit list
File written to correct quarter directory
